//: Azure-backed local-dev overlay. Activated automatically when
ASPNETCORE_ENVIRONMENT=Trial (use the 'Trial' launch profile or set the
Naming: 'Trial' matches the integration branch in our branching contract
(feature → trial → main → release). This profile is what you run locally
while iterating on changes destined for the trial branch — Azure-backed
dependencies, real Google OAuth + JWT, all the production muscles minus
Secrets policy: this committed file holds NO secrets and NO tenant
identifiers (placeholders only). Real values go in either:
* Key Vault — auto-pulled when KeyVault:Uri is non-empty (Program.cs
wires AddAzureKeyVault with DefaultAzureCredential, which uses your
`az login` locally and Managed Identity in ACA).
DISABLE_AUTH is intentionally NOT set — real Google OAuth + JWT stay on so
this profile exercises the production auth path.
Issuer + Audience are non-secret identifiers; safe to commit.
Key is resolved from Key Vault (Authentication--Jwt--Key) — never here.

//chaos-engineering: Trial is the explicit testing ground for the chaos-storage admin job
(deliberate blob deletion to validate reconcile + reap recovery).
Enable here ONLY — never copy this flag into appsettings.Production.json
or any prod-bound configuration. ChaosStorageService double-checks this
flag at run time, so without it the chaos job type is a no-op even if
an attacker enqueued one via the admin endpoint.
//base-path: Backend serves under /photogallery/* in Trial (and Production) because
the nginx-appeid reverse proxy mounts PhotoGallery at
https://appeid.app/photogallery/. Program.cs reads this and calls
generation, and Request.Scheme reflect the real mount point.
Local dev (no proxy) leaves BasePath unset / empty and serves at root.
